programs.title: Aloha, new home
programs.desc: Spouses Kamohai and Tristyn Kalama are native Hawaiians whose passion and mission is to renovate abandoned houses on the island of Oahu.Contrary to appearances, it is not just pleasant work in beautiful natural surroundings.Many of these properties are in a deplorable condition due to moisture, wind and sun.Renovations are additionally complicated by difficult terrain and changeable weather.However, the reward for designers is the end result, which is worth every moment spent renovating these amazing buildings.

programs.title: Naked and Afraid 5
programs.desc: Two unknown people, a woman and a man, are left in a lonely place with difficult climatic conditions.They must spend 21 days there without food, water or clothing.They can only take one item with them.The operators show how daredevils, relying on their own company, learn to cooperate and make key decisions together.Viewers will see that appropriate knowledge and skills can be very useful in extreme moments and even determine survival.

programs.title: Woman at the end of the world
programs.desc:
Reports showing the stories of women living in Africa, Asia and America.The heroines have different professions and follow different religions.Presenting their fate is only a pretext to show the exoticism, traditions and culture of the countries in which they live.Martyna Wojciechowska, who kept a diary from these extraordinary journeys, experienced their joys and sorrows together with her interlocutors and participated in their everyday activities.This allowed her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity
Martyna Wojciechowska visits women who are sappers in the women's unit in Cambodia.The journalist tries to find out why they chose such a risky job.One of the heroines of the reportage claims that she decided to take up this job for financial reasons.With the money he earns, he can support his family.So Tonh, 40, who is the group's commander, sees her son and daughter several days a year.However, he is happy that he can pay for their education.Every day he puts his life at risk to provide children with a decent living and a better future.

programs.title: Woman at the end of the world
programs.desc:
Reports showing the stories of women living in Africa, Asia and America.The heroines have different professions and follow different religions.Presenting their fate is only a pretext to show the exoticism, traditions and culture of the countries in which they live.Martyna Wojciechowska, who kept a diary from these extraordinary journeys, experienced their joys and sorrows together with her interlocutors and participated in their everyday activities.This allowed her to understand contrasts and learn about different approaches to femininity
Martyna Wojciechowska's guide in Kenya is Daphne Sheldrick, who has devoted fifty years of her life to fighting for the protection of animal rights.Together with her husband, she founded an orphanage for baby elephants - victims of brutal poachers.The journalist finds out what it's like to care for a baby elephant that requires a lot of attention, has a huge appetite and loves to play.The heroine of this episode has been working for fourteen years to create a milk recipe suitable for her children.Today he knows everything about them and is a legend in Kenya.
